name: e2e-engineering
description: Master engineering orchestrator — drives a Task from idea to passing E2E across pre-implementation, implementation, and post-implementation phases. Phase-adaptive entry, five hard gates, vertical-slice TDD loop with parallel worktree subagents, 65% context checkpointing. Headless queue drain via /e2e-flight. Handles greenfield, feature, bugfix, refactor, plus a one-time adopt mode.
